{{Quote|Gallandro? Slick, you're talking about the guy who single-handedly hijacked the ''Quamar Messenger'' on her maiden run and took over that pirate's nest, Geedon V, all by himself.|[[Alexsandr Badure]], to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="Han Solo and the Lost Legacy">''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]''</ref>}}
'''Geedon V''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Sumitra sector/Legends|Sumitra sector]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. It was the site of a former base for [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] operating in the [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. Once, the entire planet was single-handedly taken over by the gunman [[Gallandro/Legends|Gallandro]] during one of his early exploits.

After the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[King/Legends|King]] [[Alaric (Sephi)|Alaric]] the whole sector including this planet, left the Republic and joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Above the planet, [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] and [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]] manning [[Ghorin]]'s stolen [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]], destroyed a convoy consisting of seven [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] from ''[[Geedon]]'' group that were to supply the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] with food, according to [[Operation Grain Snatch]]. The aim was to discredit Ghorin and present him as a traitor of the Empire while bringing shortage to the Imperial supplies.

{{Planet-stub}}
